hero.tagline: Custom web applications & AI for your business
hero.headline: Build for the long term, with full flexibility
hero.description: Many companies want to start with AI but don't know how. We implement AI in custom web apps and automate your business processes — from idea to production.
hero.nameMeaning: Proceda stands for process + progress: AI gives you 24/7 visibility, analyzes data, predicts opportunities and risks, and automates execution where it matters most.

impact.title: Measurable impact for your organization
impact.subtitle: AI does not replace your people. It automates repetitive work so teams can focus on customer value, quality, and growth.
impact.roiDesc: Driven by less manual work, fewer errors, and faster turnaround times.
impact.timeDesc: Automation of recurring tasks across operations, support, and administration.
impact.insightDesc: Continuous monitoring, data analysis, and early detection of opportunities and risks.
impact.note: * Indicative ranges depend on use case, process maturity, and adoption.

portfolio.title: Dashboard portfolio by category
portfolio.subtitle: Examples of command centers we can build for each team and business goal.
portfolio.salesDesc: Pipeline, forecast, deal prioritization, and revenue by account manager in one view.
portfolio.supportDesc: Real-time visibility into wait time, SLA, sentiment, and escalations with AI guidance.
portfolio.opsDesc: Cycle time, bottlenecks, and capacity planning with automated alerts.
portfolio.financeDesc: Cash flow, margin, anomalies, and forecasting for stronger financial steering.

approach.title: The Proceda approach
approach.intro: No endless projects or fixed packages. Web apps, AI and automation: we deliver what you need, clearly and future-proof.
approach.aiDesc: Many companies want to start with AI but don't know where to begin. We implement AI in your systems and automate manual work — concrete and applicable.
approach.conceptDesc: We translate your requirements into a concrete design and technical plan, so you know exactly what you're getting.
approach.robustDesc: Clean code, clear documentation and a stack your team can easily extend later.
approach.fastDesc: No months-long projects. We work in short sprints so you see value quickly and can adjust.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: In three steps from request to a working application.
howItWorks.step1Desc: We discuss your goals, target audience and constraints and create a concrete plan and quote.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We build in iterations: you see results along the way and can give feedback. No surprises at delivery.
howItWorks.step3Desc: After delivery we provide documentation and can do maintenance or further development for you.

contact.title: Ready for AI and a custom web application?
contact.description: Want to automate processes with AI or build a custom app? Tell us your idea — we're happy to think along and give a clear estimate.

footer.tagline: Custom web applications & AI for your business

login.subtitle: Only authorized administrators can sign in.
login.tagline: Custom web applications for your business

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeDesc: This is a dummy dashboard. You got here after logging in. You can add overviews, projects and settings here later.
dashboard.verifyDeviceDesc: Scan the QR code to continue.
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome back — here's what's happening today.
dashboard.activity1: AI forecast updated after Q2 pipeline sync
dashboard.activity2: SLA alert resolved for support queue West-EU
dashboard.activity3: Finance risk model flagged delayed receivables

product.overviewSubtitle: Strategy, market research and roadmap for the broker portal.
product.cardMarktonderzoekDesc: What brokers really need in a web application — must-haves vs. differentiation.
product.modulesSubtitle: MoSCoW priority and Proceda status per feature.
product.mvpBody: Start with daily broker workflows and what the demo already shows — then compliance and integrations.
product.mvpStep1: Dashboard, listings, leads, calendar, tasks (extend demo to working product)
product.mvpStep2: Light seller portal + email/timeline linked to property
product.mvpStep3: Funda/website sync and document folder per property
product.mvpStep4: Bid log + AML checks (or Move.nl API integration if available)

adminAnalytics.title: Live view — globe
adminAnalytics.subtitle: Visitors, demo booking and conversion · refreshed at {time} (every 4s)
adminAnalytics.noActiveVisitors: No active visitors — open the site in another tab to test.

adminKpi.title: KPI Dashboard
adminKpi.subtitle: Pipeline, leads and projected revenue from your business data and reports.
adminKpi.outreachSubtitle: Email is extracted from the website during scrape; phone comes from Google Places.
adminKpi.autoMailerRuleDesc: Qualified when a valid email address is found (from website during scrape).
adminKpi.callListRuleDesc: Qualified when a phone number from Google Places is available.
adminKpi.noOutreachChannel: {count} businesses with neither email nor phone.
adminKpi.qualityGuideTitle: What is the difference between hot, warm and cold leads?
adminKpi.qualityGuideIntro: Each report gets a lead score (0–100). A higher score means Proceda can likely deliver more value — especially when the website is outdated in a strong vertical.
adminKpi.scoreFormulaTitle: How is the lead score calculated?
adminKpi.scoreFactorPain: Website opportunity ({pct}%): lower SEO + modernity = higher score
adminKpi.scoreFactorCategory: Vertical fit ({pct}%): hospitality, retail and services score higher
adminKpi.scoreFactorContent: Site content: up to +{max} points when enough text is found
adminKpi.scoreFormulaNote: Note: a polished corporate site (high SEO/modernity) scores lower — less urgency for a new web app.
adminKpi.qualityHotDesc: Strong sales opportunity: weak or outdated site, good vertical fit, site scans well.
adminKpi.qualityWarmDesc: Moderate potential: some digitisation opportunity, less urgent or weaker fit.
adminKpi.qualityWarmMeaning: → Follow up after hot leads; nurture or light proposal.
adminKpi.qualityColdDesc: Low priority: modern site, little pain, or failed scan / thin content.
adminKpi.qualityColdMeaning: → Only when capacity allows; lower conversion chance.
adminKpi.qualityColdPipeline: Not in pipeline revenue — still visible in reporting.
adminKpi.noProvinces: No province data yet — start scraping under Businesses.

adminBusinesses.title: Businesses
adminBusinesses.subtitle: Nationwide scraping by branch and province — via Google Places.
adminBusinesses.provinceNotEnabled: This province is not available yet.
adminBusinesses.outreachSubtitle: Email from website scrape; phone from Google Places. Ready for auto mailer once a report exists.
adminBusinesses.outreachMailNote: Bulk email via Mail requires an AI report per business (Reports). Without a report, the business won't appear in the send queue.
adminBusinesses.noData: No data yet for {province}. Click „Refresh data” to scrape.
adminBusinesses.scrapeError: Failed to collect data. Please try again.
adminBusinesses.rateLimit: Server is busy (too many requests). Wait a few minutes and try again.
adminBusinesses.rateLimitCooldown: Please wait {seconds} seconds before refreshing again.
adminBusinesses.googleRequired: Google Places API missing. Add GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY to .env.local

adminHuisstijl.title: Brand style
adminHuisstijl.subtitle: Review logo and colors extracted from each broker website before sending personalized demos.
adminHuisstijl.hintRefresh: Refresh palette: npx tsx scripts/enrich-demo-ready-palette.ts — full scan: npx tsx scripts/count-demo-ready.ts

adminAfspraken.title: Appointments
adminAfspraken.subtitle: Google Meet appointments with leads — from cold calling or auto mailer.
adminAfspraken.emptyHint: Add a Meet appointment after a successful call or email reply.
adminAfspraken.calendarNote: Google Calendar sync coming later — register Meet links manually for now.
adminAfspraken.slotTaken: This time slot is already booked — choose another.
adminAfspraken.calendarLegend: Mon–Fri 08:00–20:00 · Shared calendar for all demo-mail leads
adminAfspraken.calendarSharedNote: One shared calendar for all demo leads. A scheduled appointment blocks that slot on the booking page immediately.

adminMail.title: Mail
adminMail.subtitle: Personalized outreach templates per lead (from reports), with a purple CTA to the demo booking page.
adminMail.subtitleDemo: Send list for all demo-ready brokers (logo + brand). Select a client for HTML preview; send via SMTP when Hostinger is connected.
adminMail.sendListBody: Brokers with email and dashboard preview. Sent emails only contain the purple booking CTA — no links to the live dashboard.
adminMail.demoClickDetail: Booking page visited · {count} page view(s) · {sessions} session(s) · last {last}
adminMail.demoNotClickedYet: No visit to the personal booking page yet (or email scanner only).
adminMail.ctaNoteBody: The purple button links to a landing page where the lead picks a time (Mon–Fri 08:00–20:00, next 2 business days).
adminMail.alreadySent: This lead was already sent (or booked) — no duplicate email.
adminMail.empty: No leads with email and report
adminMail.emptyHint: Generate reports and ensure email is available from website scan.
adminMail.testSendHint: Sends the selected draft preview to your test address. Lead status stays draft — use this to test the booking CTA.
adminMail.notConfigured: Mail not configured. Set MAIL_USER and MAIL_PASSWORD in .env.local (Hostinger IMAP/SMTP).
adminMail.sentEmpty: No sent messages. Click Sync to fetch from the Sent folder.
adminMail.inboxEmpty: No messages. Sync to fetch mail from info@proceda.nl.
adminMail.hintScreenshots: Dashboard screenshot in emails: BASE_URL=http://localhost:3001 npx tsx scripts/capture-demo-dashboard-screenshots.ts

demoBooking.notFound: This invitation is invalid or expired.
demoBooking.errorInvalidSlot: This time slot is no longer available. Please choose another.
demoBooking.title: Schedule your free demo
demoBooking.subtitle: Pick a 30-minute slot to discuss custom software for {name}.
demoBooking.hoursHint: Available Monday–Friday, 08:00–20:00 — from tomorrow up to 2 weeks ahead.
demoBooking.dashboardPreviewHint: This is how a dashboard could look in {name}'s branding — we'll walk through it live during the demo.
demoBooking.noSlots: No times left on this day.
demoBooking.confirmedSubtitle: Thank you — we will follow up with a Google Meet link.
demoBooking.confirmedHint: You will receive a confirmation email shortly.

adminRapportage.title: Reporting
adminRapportage.subtitle: Businesses with a website — generate a Proceda proposal with screenshot and AI analysis.
adminRapportage.scrapeLogEmpty: No batch log. Start scrape via script or Businesses page.
adminRapportage.hint: Click a business to open the full report. The list auto-refreshes every 15 seconds during batch generation.
adminRapportage.search: Search by name, website or city…
adminRapportage.empty: No businesses with a website. Scrape businesses under Businesses first.
adminRapportage.fullReportHint: Scraping all pages, extracting brand, AI report and demo homepage — may take 3–5 minutes.
adminRapportage.demoHomepageSub: Modern homepage in their colors, logo and content — show a new website alongside the app proposal.
adminRapportage.demoAppSub: Branded broker portal — KPIs, listings, leads and tasks for your demo call.
adminRapportage.generatingHint: Screenshot, website analysis and AI proposal — may take 1–2 minutes.
adminRapportage.noReportYet: No report yet. Click «Generate report» for screenshot, services and AI proposal.
adminRapportage.aiSubtitle: Custom web apps, automation and outreach draft
